text.title: Reporting Basics Worked Example
text.summary: One end-to-end worked example demonstrating a clean application of Reporting Basics, anchored to the schema in content/02-output-contract.xml.

example.title: Reporting Basics — clean application
example.note: rb-2026-W21 — 3 KPIs from orion/flow dashboard; throughput 14 vs threshold 12; open critical bugs 3 (breach); narrative 4 lines; escalation owner Marko P.
